mapper.sql: id, user_id, article_id, behavior_type, behavior_weight, create_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM user_behavior WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND article_id = #{articleId} AND behavior_type = #{behaviorType}
SELECT FROM user_behavior WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND behavior_type = #{behaviorType}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_behavior (user_id, article_id, behavior_type, behavior_weight) VALUES (#{userId}, #{articleId}, #{behaviorType}, #{behaviorWeight})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM user_behavior WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND article_id = #{articleId} AND behavior_type = #{behaviorType}
